product_description: The Sleep Company is an Indian comfort-tech D2C brand offering smart mattresses, recliner beds, and sleep accessories with patented SmartGRID technology, sold online and in 200+ retail stores across India.
biggest_fear: Intense market competition, supply chain disruptions, maintaining profitability during aggressive expansion

product_description: EcoFlow designs and manufactures portable power and clean energy solutions, including power stations, solar panels, and smart home energy systems, operating globally.
biggest_fear: Supply chain disruptions, Intense competition, Rapid technological changes
